final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire D,
    input wire WE,
    input wire RE,
    input wire CLK,
    output reg Q
);
    reg stored_bit;

    always @(posedge CLK) begin
  if (WE) begin stored_bit <= D ; // Write operation
  end
  end

  always @(posedge CLK) begin
  if (RE) begin Q <= stored_bit ; // Read operation
  end
  end
endmodule
